local function startMovementLoop(self_13) --[[ Line: 416 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = RunService
		[2] = FishingConfig
	--]]
	self_13.trove:Connect(RunService.Heartbeat, function() --[[ Line: 417 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:
			[1] = self_13
			[2] = FishingConfig
		--]]
		local value_11 = tick()
		for index_3, originalRotation_2 in self_13.activeBrainrots do
			if originalRotation_2.hooked then
				continue
			end
			local model_3 = originalRotation_2.model
			if model_3 and model_3.Parent then
				local v_9 = value_11 - originalRotation_2.spawnTime - (originalRotation_2.totalPausedTime or 0)
				local value_12 = math.max(0, v_9)
				local v_10 = originalRotation_2.dropDuration
				local Unit_2, X
				if value_12 <= v_10 then
					Unit_2 = value_12 / v_10
					local value_13 = math.min(Unit_2, 1)
					local dropStartPos = originalRotation_2.dropStartPos
					local value_14 = FishingConfig.DROP_FORWARD_DISTANCE * value_13
					X = dropStartPos + self_13.flowDirection * value_14
					local riverSurfaceY = self_13.riverSurfaceY
					local Y = dropStartPos.Y
					local value_15 = riverSurfaceY + 8
					local value_16 = math.max(Y, value_15)
					if value_13 < 0.5 then
						local value_17 = (value_13 / 0.5) ^ 2
						value_15 = value_16 + (riverSurfaceY - 1.5 - value_16) * value_17
					else
						value_16 = 1 - (1 - (value_13 - 0.5) / 0.5) ^ 2
						value_15 = riverSurfaceY - 1.5 + value_16 * 1.5
					end
					self_13:setModelCFrame(model_3, CFrame.new(X.X, value_15, X.Z) * originalRotation_2.originalRotation)
					originalRotation_2.dropping = true
				else
					originalRotation_2.dropping = false
					X = (value_12 - v_10) * originalRotation_2.speed
					local X_2 = self_13.flowDirection.X
					v_10 = self_13.flowDirection.Z
					Unit_2 = Vector3.new(X_2, 0, v_10).Unit
					local X_3 = originalRotation_2.dropLandPos + Unit_2 * X
					local v_11 = self_13.riverSurfaceY
					local value_18 = (value_11 + originalRotation_2.bobOffset) * FishingConfig.BOB_FREQUENCY * math.pi * 2
					local v_12 = v_11 + math.sin(value_18) * FishingConfig.BOB_AMPLITUDE
					v_11 = X_3.X
					local Z = X_3.Z
					local vector3 = Vector3.new(v_11, v_12, Z)
					local value_19 = value_11 + originalRotation_2.bobOffset
					local value_20 = value_19 * 0.8
					v_12 = math.sin(value_20) * 0.1 * math.pi

					end
				end
			else
				self_13.activeBrainrots[index_3] = nil
			end
		end
	end)
end

local function getBrainrotUnderMouse(self_19, X_6) --[[ Line: 648 ]]
	local Direction = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(X_6.X, X_6.Y)
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
	local InstanceTable = {}
	for index_4, model_5 in self_19.activeBrainrots do
		if not (model_5.model and model_5.model.Parent) then
			continue
		end
		local model_6 = model_5.model
		table.insert(InstanceTable, model_6)
	end
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = InstanceTable
	InstanceTable = workspace:Raycast(Direction.Origin, Direction.Direction * 500, raycastParams)
	if InstanceTable and InstanceTable.Instance then
		for index_5, model_7 in self_19.activeBrainrots do
			if not model_7.model or not InstanceTable.Instance:IsDescendantOf(model_7.model) and model_7.model ~= InstanceTable.Instance then
				continue
			end
			return index_5, model_7
		end
	end
	return nil
end
newTable.getBrainrotUnderMouse = getBrainrotUnderMouse
local function isClickOnRiver(self_20, X_7) --[[ Line: 668 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = flowDirection
	--]]
	local Direction_2 = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(X_7.X, X_7.Y)
	local _waterVisualPart = self_20._waterVisualPart or flowDirection.riverPart
	local raycastParams_2 = RaycastParams.new()
	raycastParams_2.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
	raycastParams_2.FilterDescendantsInstances = { _waterVisualPart }
	local Instance = workspace:Raycast(Direction_2.Origin, Direction_2.Direction * 500, raycastParams_2)
	if Instance and Instance.Instance == _waterVisualPart then
		return true, Instance.Position
	else
		return false
	end
end

local function createPreviewRing(self_27) --[[ Line: 837 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = ReplicatedStorage
	--]]
	if self_27._riverPreviewRing then
		return self_27._riverPreviewRing
	end
	local riverHoverPart = ReplicatedStorage.Assets:FindFirstChild("riverHoverPart")
	if not riverHoverPart then
		warn("[FishingClient] riverHoverPart not found!")
		return nil
	end

	PreviewRing.Anchored = true
	PreviewRing.CanCollide = false
	PreviewRing.CFrame = CFrame.new(0, -1000, 0)
	PreviewRing.Parent = workspace
	self_27._riverPreviewRing = PreviewRing

end

local function startCastCheckLoop(self_31) --[[ Line: 889 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = RunService
		[2] = localPlayer
		[3] = state_table
		[4] = Brainrots
	--]]
	self_31.trove:Connect(RunService.Heartbeat, function() --[[ Line: 890 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:
			[1] = self_31
			[2] = localPlayer
			[3] = state_table
			[4] = Brainrots
		--]]
		local TutorialController_2 = self_31.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId]
		if not TutorialController_2 then
			return
		end
		if self_31.localHookUUID then
			return
		end
		local position_9 = TutorialController_2.position
		local radius = TutorialController_2.radius
		TutorialController_2 = state_table.TutorialController
		local model_10 = TutorialController_2:isActive()
		if model_10 then
			model_10 = TutorialController_2:getStep() == 2
		end
		for index_6, brainrotName in self_31.activeBrainrots do
			if brainrotName.dropping then
				continue
			end
			if model_10 then
				model_10 = Brainrots[brainrotName.brainrotName]
				if not model_10 or model_10.rarity == "Common" then
					local model_11 = brainrotName.model
					if model_11 and model_11.Parent then
						local value_45 = self_31:getModelPosition(model_11)
						if value_45 and (value_45 - position_9).Magnitude <= radius then
							self_31.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId] = nil
							self_31.localHookUUID = index_6
							self_31.localCastActive = false
							self_31:setRiverHoverActive(false)
							self_31:applyHookEffects(index_6)
							self_31:playHookAnimation(localPlayer.UserId, index_6)
							self_31._sfx:play("brainrotHookStarted")
							self_31:onCatchStart(index_6, brainrotName)
							self_31.FishingService.remote:Fire({
								["uuid"] = index_6
							})
							return
						end
					end
				end
			else
				model_10 = brainrotName.model
				if model_10 and model_10.Parent then
					local value_45 = self_31:getModelPosition(model_11)
					if value_45 and (value_45 - position_9).Magnitude <= radius then
						self_31.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId] = nil
						self_31.localHookUUID = index_6
						self_31.localCastActive = false
						self_31:setRiverHoverActive(false)
						self_31:applyHookEffects(index_6)
						self_31:playHookAnimation(localPlayer.UserId, index_6)
						self_31._sfx:play("brainrotHookStarted")
						self_31:onCatchStart(index_6, brainrotName)
						self_31.FishingService.remote:Fire({
							["uuid"] = index_6

		end

	self_35._weightCountConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 1307 ]]

		--]]

			self_35._weightCountConn = nil
		end
	end)

					end

					_reelOriginalPos._reelRotation = position_11 - position_11.Position

					end

					return
				end
			else

		else

local function equipBestAndPlace() --[[ Line: 555 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = flag_7
		[2] = PlotController
		[3] = showNotification
		[4] = getSortedBrainrots
		[5] = PlotRemote
		[6] = localPlayer
	--]]
	if flag_7 then
		return
	end
	flag_7 = true
	local standParts = PlotController
	if standParts then
		standParts = PlotController.getPlot()
	end
	if not standParts then
		showNotification("No plot found!", Color3.fromRGB(200, 60, 60), 2)
		flag_7 = false
		return
	end
	local entryTable = getSortedBrainrots()
	if #entryTable == 0 then
		showNotification("No brainrots in inventory!", Color3.fromRGB(200, 60, 60), 2)
		flag_7 = false
		return
	end
	local entryState = {}
	for index_9, entry_5 in pairs(standParts.standParts or {}) do
		if standParts:isStandPlaced(index_9) then
			continue
		end
		table.insert(entryState, index_9)
	end
	standParts = #entryTable
	local income_3 = #entryState
	for index_10 = 1, math.min(standParts, income_3) do
		income_3 = entryTable[index_10]
		standParts = entryState[index_10]
		PlotRemote:FireServer({
			["brainrotUUID"] = income_3.uuid,
			["stand"] = standParts
		})
		local value_5 = value_5 + 1
		print("[EquipBest] Placing", income_3.bd.name, "(income:" .. income_3.income .. ") on", standParts)
		task.wait(0.3)
	end
	if #entryTable > #entryState then
		income_3 = entryTable[#entryState + 1]
		if localPlayer.Backpack then
			for index_11, entry_6 in ipairs(localPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
				if not entry_6:IsA("Tool") or entry_6:GetAttribute("brainrotUUID") ~= income_3.uuid then
					continue
				end
				entryTable = entry_6
				break
			end
		end
		if nil then
			local character_4 = localPlayer.Character
			standParts = character_4 and character_4:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			if standParts then
				standParts:UnequipTools()
				standParts:EquipTool(entryTable)
			end
		end
	end
	if 0 > 0 then
		showNotification("Placed " .. value_5 .. " brainrot" .. (value_5 > 1 and "s" or "") .. " on empty stands!", Color3.fromRGB(60, 180, 80), 3)
	elseif #entryState == 0 then
		showNotification("All stands are full!", Color3.fromRGB(200, 160, 40), 2)
	else
		showNotification("No brainrots to place!", Color3.fromRGB(200, 60, 60), 2)
	end
	flag_7 = false
end

local function removeExistingNameGui(param_2) --[[ Line: 37 ]]
	for index, Name in param_2:GetDescendants() do
		if not Name:IsA("BillboardGui") or Name.Name ~= "NameGui" then
			continue

	end

local function attachNameGui(Parent, mutation) --[[ Line: 45 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = removeExistingNameGui
		[2] = MiddleMan
	--]]
	if Parent and Parent.Parent then
		removeExistingNameGui(Parent)
		MiddleMan:attachNameGui(Parent, {
			["name"] = mutation.name or "",
			["mutation"] = mutation.mutation or "Basic",
			["level"] = mutation.level or 1
		}, false, 0.8, 60)
	end
end
local function addCopyPrompt(gui, flag_3) --[[ Line: 65 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = localPlayer
		[2] = addCopyPrompt
	--]]
	if flag_3 == localPlayer.UserId then
		return
	elseif gui:FindFirstChild("CopyPrompt") then
		return
	else
		local PrimaryPart = gui.PrimaryPart or gui:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
		if PrimaryPart then
			local CopyPrompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
			CopyPrompt.Name = "CopyPrompt"
			CopyPrompt.ActionText = "Copy"
			CopyPrompt.ObjectText = gui:GetAttribute("brainrotName") or gui.Name
			CopyPrompt.HoldDuration = 0.8
			CopyPrompt.MaxActivationDistance = 8
			CopyPrompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
			CopyPrompt.Parent = PrimaryPart
			CopyPrompt.Triggered:Connect(function() --[[ Line: 90 ]]
				--[[
				Upvalues:
					[1] = gui
				--]]
				local brainrotUUID = gui:GetAttribute("brainrotUUID")
				if brainrotUUID then
					if _G.CopyBrainrotClient and _G.CopyBrainrotClient.requestCopy then
						_G.CopyBrainrotClient.requestCopy(brainrotUUID)
					else
						warn("[PlotClient] _G.CopyBrainrotClient not ready yet.")
					end
				else
					warn("[PlotClient] CopyPrompt triggered but model has no brainrotUUID:", gui:GetFullName())
					return
				end
			end)
		else
			task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 71 ]]
				--[[
				Upvalues:
					[1] = gui
					[2] = PrimaryPart
					[3] = addCopyPrompt
					[4] = flag_3
				--]]
				task.wait(0.5)
				if gui and gui.Parent then
					PrimaryPart = gui.PrimaryPart or gui:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
					if PrimaryPart then
						addCopyPrompt(gui, flag_3)
					end
				else
					return
				end
			end)
		end
	end
end
local function attachNameGuiFromAttributes(Parent_2, param_3) --[[ Line: 109 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = attachNameGui
		[2] = addCopyPrompt
	--]]
	if Parent_2 and Parent_2.Parent then
		local brainrotName = Parent_2:GetAttribute("brainrotName")
		if brainrotName then
			attachNameGui(Parent_2, {
				["name"] = brainrotName,
				["mutation"] = Parent_2:GetAttribute("mutation") or "Basic",
				["level"] = Parent_2:GetAttribute("level") or 1
			})
			addCopyPrompt(Parent_2, param_3)
		else
			task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 114 ]]
				--[[
				Upvalues:
					[1] = Parent_2
					[2] = brainrotName
					[3] = attachNameGui
					[4] = addCopyPrompt
					[5] = param_3
				--]]
				local v_2 = tick() + 8
				while tick() < v_2 do
					task.wait(0.2)
					if not (Parent_2 and Parent_2.Parent) then
						return
					end
					brainrotName = Parent_2:GetAttribute("brainrotName")
					if not brainrotName then
						continue
					end
					break
				end
				if brainrotName then
					attachNameGui(Parent_2, {
						["name"] = brainrotName,
						["mutation"] = Parent_2:GetAttribute("mutation") or "Basic",
						["level"] = Parent_2:GetAttribute("level") or 1
					})
					addCopyPrompt(Parent_2, param_3)
				else
					warn("[PlotClient] Model has no brainrotName after waiting:", Parent_2:GetFullName())
				end
			end)
		end
	else
		return
	end
end

local function scanPlot(Name_2) --[[ Line: 156 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = plotName
		[2] = entry
		[3] = attachNameGui
		[4] = attachNameGuiFromAttributes
	--]]
	local OwnerId_2 = Name_2:GetAttribute("OwnerId")
	if OwnerId_2 then
		OwnerId_2 = tonumber(OwnerId_2)
	end
	local Brainrots = Name_2:FindFirstChild("Brainrots")
	if Brainrots then
		for index_2, Name_3 in ipairs(Brainrots:GetChildren()) do
			if Name_2.Name == plotName then
				Brainrots = entry[Name_3.Name]
				if Brainrots then
					attachNameGui(Name_3, Brainrots)
				else
					attachNameGuiFromAttributes(Name_3, OwnerId_2)
				end
			else
				attachNameGuiFromAttributes(Name_3, OwnerId_2)
			end
		end
	end
end

local function waitAndAttach(param_5, param_6, param_7) --[[ Line: 261 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = plotName
		[2] = attachNameGui
	--]]
	local param_8 = param_7 or 8
	task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 263 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:
			[1] = param_5
			[2] = plotName
			[3] = param_8
			[4] = attachNameGui
			[5] = param_6
		--]]
		local value = tick()
		local plots_4 = param_5
		local v_3, flag_8
		if plotName then
			v_3 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
			if v_3 then
				flag_8 = v_3:FindFirstChild(plotName)
				if flag_8 then
					v_3 = flag_8:FindFirstChild("Brainrots")
				else
					v_3 = nil
				end
			else
				v_3 = nil
			end
		else
			v_3 = nil
		end
		if v_3 then
			v_3 = v_3:FindFirstChild(plots_4)
		end
		while not v_3 and tick() - value < param_8 do
			task.wait(0.1)
			if plotName then
				plots_4 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
				if plots_4 then
					flag_8 = plots_4:FindFirstChild(plotName)

			end

				continue
			end
			v_3 = v_3:FindFirstChild(param_5)
		end
		if v_3 then
			attachNameGui(v_3, param_6)
		else
			warn("[PlotClient] Timed out waiting for stand model:", param_5)
		end
	end)

	Upvalues:

		[2] = entry

	--]]

			if plotName then
				v_7 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
				if v_7 then
					flag_11 = v_7:FindFirstChild(plotName)
					if flag_11 then

					end
				else
					v_7 = nil
				end
			else
				v_7 = nil
			end
			if v_7 then
				v_7 = v_7:FindFirstChild(index_8)
			end
			if not (v_7 and v_7.Parent) then
				continue
			end
			for index_9, Name_6 in ipairs(v_7:GetDescendants()) do
				if not Name_6:IsA("BillboardGui") or Name_6.Name ~= "NameGui" then
					continue
				end
				flag_11 = true
			end

			end

		end

PlotRemote.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(arguments) --[[ Line: 315 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = plotName
		[2] = entry
		[3] = refreshAllNameGuis
		[4] = scanAllPlots
		[5] = attachNameGui
	--]]
	if type(arguments) == "table" and arguments.kind then
		local kind = arguments.kind
		if kind == "givePlot" then
			plotName = arguments.plotName
			entry = {}
			local plotDatas = arguments.plotDatas
			if plotDatas and plotDatas.brainrotStands then
				for index_10, mutation_2 in pairs(plotDatas.brainrotStands) do
					entry[index_10] = {
						["name"] = mutation_2.name or "",
						["mutation"] = mutation_2.mutation or "Basic",
						["level"] = mutation_2.level or 1
					}
				end
			end
			refreshAllNameGuis()
			task.delay(1, refreshAllNameGuis)
			task.delay(3, refreshAllNameGuis)
			task.delay(6, refreshAllNameGuis)
			task.delay(1, scanAllPlots)
			task.delay(3, scanAllPlots)
			task.delay(6, scanAllPlots)
			return
		elseif kind == "brainrotPlaced" then
			local stand = arguments.stand
			local brainrotData = arguments.brainrotData
			if stand and brainrotData then
				local state_table = {
					["name"] = brainrotData.name or "",
					["mutation"] = brainrotData.mutation or "Basic",
					["level"] = brainrotData.level or 1
				}
				entry[stand] = state_table
				local capturedVar_u_8 = nil or 8
				task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 263 ]]
					--[[
					Upvalues:
						[1] = stand
						[2] = plotName
						[3] = capturedVar_u_8
						[4] = attachNameGui
						[5] = state_table
					--]]
					local value_3 = tick()
					local v_9 = stand
					local v_10, flag_12
					if plotName then
						v_10 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
						if v_10 then
							flag_12 = v_10:FindFirstChild(plotName)
							if flag_12 then
								v_10 = flag_12:FindFirstChild("Brainrots")
							else
								v_10 = nil
							end
						else
							v_10 = nil
						end
					else
						v_10 = nil
					end
					if v_10 then
						v_10 = v_10:FindFirstChild(v_9)
					end
					while not v_10 and tick() - value_3 < capturedVar_u_8 do
						task.wait(0.1)
						if plotName then
							v_9 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
							if v_9 then
								flag_12 = v_9:FindFirstChild(plotName)
								if flag_12 then
									v_10 = flag_12:FindFirstChild("Brainrots")
								else
									v_10 = nil
								end
							else
								v_10 = nil
							end
						else
							v_10 = nil
						end
						if not v_10 then
							continue
						end
						v_10 = v_10:FindFirstChild(stand)
					end
					if v_10 then
						attachNameGui(v_10, state_table)
					else
						warn("[PlotClient] Timed out waiting for stand model:", stand)
					end
				end)
			end
		else
			if kind == "brainrotStacked" then
				local stand_2 = arguments.stand
				local level = arguments.level
				if not stand_2 then
					return
				end
				if entry[stand_2] then
					entry[stand_2].level = level or entry[stand_2].level + 1
				end
				local flag_13 = entry[stand_2]
				local Brainrots_5
				if plotName then
					local plots_6 = workspace:FindFirstChild("plots")
					if plots_6 then
						local flag_14 = plots_6:FindFirstChild(plotName)
						if flag_14 then
							Brainrots_5 = flag_14:FindFirstChild("Brainrots")
						else
							Brainrots_5 = nil
						end
					else
						Brainrots_5 = nil
					end
				else
					Brainrots_5 = nil
				end
				if Brainrots_5 then
					Brainrots_5 = Brainrots_5:FindFirstChild(stand_2)
				end
				if Brainrots_5 and flag_13 then
					attachNameGui(Brainrots_5, flag_13)
					return
				end
			elseif kind == "brainrotRemoved" and arguments.stand then
				entry[arguments.stand] = nil
			end
			return
		end
	else
		return
	end
end)

local function closeGiftPanel() --[[ Line: 496 ]]

			Completed:Cancel()
		end

		if GiftPanel_2 then
			Completed = TweenService:Create(GiftPanel_2, TweenInfo.new(0.25, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {
				["Position"] = UDim2.new(GiftPanel_2.Position.X.Scale, GiftPanel_2.Position.X.Offset, GiftPanel_2.Position.Y.Scale + GiftPanel_2.Size.Y.Scale + 0.05, GiftPanel_2.Position.Y.Offset)
			})
			Completed:Play()

				--[[
				Upvalues:
					[1] = guiGiftPanel_2
				--]]
				if guiGiftPanel_2 then
					guiGiftPanel_2:Destroy()
					guiGiftPanel_2 = nil
				end
			end)
		else
			guiGiftPanel_2:Destroy()
			guiGiftPanel_2 = nil
		end
		flag_14 = false
	end
end

	Upvalues:
		[1] = PlayerGui
	--]]
	local notChanging = PlayerGui:WaitForChild("notChanging", 10)
	if notChanging then
		local bottom = notChanging:WaitForChild("bottom", 10)
		if bottom then
			return bottom:WaitForChild("announcement", 10)
		else
			return nil
		end
	else
		return nil
	end
end
local function getTemplate(flag) --[[ Line: 30 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = Assets
	--]]
	if flag == "normal" then
		return Assets:FindFirstChild("normalAnnouncment")
	elseif flag == "raritySpawn" then
		return Assets:FindFirstChild("raritySpawnAnnouncment")
	elseif flag then
		return Assets:FindFirstChild("trueAnnouncment")
	else
		return Assets:FindFirstChild("falseAnnouncment")
	end
end
local function setText(param, text) --[[ Line: 38 ]]

		v_1.Text = text

			v_1 = ImageLabel:FindFirstChild("orginalText")
			local orginalText3d = ImageLabel:FindFirstChild("orginalText3d")
			if v_1 then
				v_1.Text = text
			end
			if orginalText3d then
				orginalText3d.Text = text
			end
		end
	end
end

local function isBrainrotPlaced(flag_3) --[[ Line: 141 ]]
	for index = 1, 30 do
		local PlotController = _G.PlotController
		if PlotController then
			break
		end
		task.wait(0.1)
	end
	if not nil then
	else
		local brainrotStands = PlotController.getPlot()
		if not brainrotStands then
			return false
		end
		for index_2, name in pairs(brainrotStands.brainrotStands) do
			if name.name ~= flag_3 then
				continue
			end
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end
local function canRebirthLocally() --[[ Line: 157 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = RebirthConfig
		[2] = rebirthCountTable
		[3] = localPlayer
		[4] = isBrainrotPlaced
	--]]
	local v_6 = RebirthConfig[rebirthCountTable.rebirthCount + 1]
	if not v_6 then
		return false
	end
	local requirements = v_6.requirements
	if not requirements then
	else
		v_6 = localPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
		if v_6 then
			v_6 = v_6:FindFirstChild("Money")
		end
		local flag_4 = v_6 and v_6.Value or 0
		if requirements.Money and flag_4 < requirements.Money then
			return false
		end
		if requirements.brainrots then
			for index_3, entry in ipairs(requirements.brainrots) do
				if isBrainrotPlaced(entry) then
					continue
				end
				return false
			end
		end
	end
	return true
end
local function updateCashBar() --[[ Line: 175 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = RebirthConfig
		[2] = rebirthCountTable
		[3] = cashText
		[4] = Bar
		[5] = localPlayer
		[6] = MiddleMan
	--]]
	local v_7 = RebirthConfig[rebirthCountTable.rebirthCount + 1]
	if v_7 then
		local value = v_7.requirements and v_7.requirements.Money or 0
		v_7 = localPlayer:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
		if v_7 then
			v_7 = v_7:FindFirstChild("Money")
		end
		local value_2 = v_7 and v_7.Value or 0
		cashText.Text = MiddleMan:suffix(value_2) .. "/" .. MiddleMan:suffix(value)
		if value > 0 then
			local v_8 = value_2 / value
			value_2 = math.clamp(v_8, 0, 1) or 0
		else
			local amount = 0
		end
		Bar.Size = UDim2.new(value_2, 0, 1, 0)
	else
		cashText.Text = "MAX REBIRTH"
		Bar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
	end
end
local function updateNeed() --[[ Line: 189 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = Need
		[2] = ExampleNeededBrainrot
		[3] = RebirthConfig
		[4] = rebirthCountTable
		[5] = Brainrots
		[6] = isBrainrotPlaced
		[7] = MiddleMan
	--]]
	for index_4, entry_2 in ipairs(Need:GetChildren()) do
		if not entry_2:IsA("ImageLabel") or entry_2 == ExampleNeededBrainrot then
			continue
		end
		entry_2:Destroy()
	end
	ExampleNeededBrainrot.Visible = false
	local requirements_2 = RebirthConfig[rebirthCountTable.rebirthCount + 1]
	if requirements_2 then
		local v_9 = requirements_2.requirements
		if v_9 then
			v_9 = requirements_2.requirements.brainrots
		end
		if v_9 then
			for index_5, entry_3 in ipairs(v_9) do
				v_9 = Brainrots[entry_3]
				if not v_9 then
					continue
				end
				local clonedExampleNeededBrainrot = ExampleNeededBrainrot:Clone()
				clonedExampleNeededBrainrot.Name = entry_3
				clonedExampleNeededBrainrot.Visible = true
				local v_10 = isBrainrotPlaced(entry_3)
				local BrainrotImage = clonedExampleNeededBrainrot:WaitForChild("BrainrotImage")
				BrainrotImage.Image = v_9.image or ""
				BrainrotImage.ImageColor3 = v_10 and Color3.new(1, 1, 1) or Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
				BrainrotImage:WaitForChild("BrainrotName").Text = v_9.name
				MiddleMan:applyRarityStyle(BrainrotImage:WaitForChild("Rarity"), v_9.rarity)
				clonedExampleNeededBrainrot.Parent = Need
			end
		end
	else
		return
	end
end
local function updateGet() --[[ Line: 218 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = Get
		[2] = ExampleStandGet
		[3] = ExampleFloorGet
		[4] = ExampleCashBoost
		[5] = ExampleAutoPull
		[6] = RebirthConfig
		[7] = rebirthCountTable
	--]]
	for index_6, entry_4 in ipairs(Get:GetChildren()) do
		if not entry_4:IsA("ImageLabel") or (entry_4 == ExampleStandGet or (entry_4 == ExampleFloorGet or (entry_4 == ExampleCashBoost or entry_4 == ExampleAutoPull))) then
			continue
		end
		entry_4:Destroy()
	end
	ExampleStandGet.Visible = false
	ExampleFloorGet.Visible = false
	ExampleCashBoost.Visible = false
	ExampleAutoPull.Visible = false
	local gives = RebirthConfig[rebirthCountTable.rebirthCount + 1]
	if gives and gives.gives then
		local gives_2 = gives.gives
		local StandCount
		if gives_2.floor then
			local clonedExampleFloorGet = ExampleFloorGet:Clone()
			clonedExampleFloorGet.Name = gives_2.floor
			clonedExampleFloorGet.Visible = true
			StandCount = string.match(gives_2.floor, "Floor(%d+)")
			clonedExampleFloorGet:WaitForChild("ImageLabel"):WaitForChild("FloorName").Text = "Floor " .. (StandCount or "?")
			clonedExampleFloorGet.Parent = Get
		end
		local gives_3
		if gives_2.stands and #gives_2.stands > 0 then
			local Stands = ExampleStandGet:Clone()
			Stands.Name = "Stands"
			Stands.Visible = true
			StandCount = Stands:WaitForChild("ImageLabel"):WaitForChild("StandCount")
			gives_3 = #gives_2.stands
			StandCount.Text = tostring(gives_3) .. " New stand"
			Stands.Parent = Get
		end
		if gives_2.GeneralCashBoost then
			gives_3 = RebirthConfig[rebirthCountTable.rebirthCount]
			if gives_3 then
				local flag_5 = gives_3.gives and (gives_3.gives.GeneralCashBoost or 1) or flag_6
			end
			local v_11 = (gives_2.GeneralCashBoost - 1) * 100
			local flag_6 = math.round(v_11)
			if flag_6 > 0 then
				local CashBoost = ExampleCashBoost:Clone()
				CashBoost.Name = "CashBoost"
				CashBoost.Visible = true
				CashBoost:WaitForChild("ImageLabel"):WaitForChild("StandCount").Text = "+" .. flag_6 .. "% Cash Boost"
				CashBoost.Parent = Get
			end
		end
		if gives_2.autoPull then
			local AutoPull = ExampleAutoPull:Clone()
			AutoPull.Name = "AutoPull"
			AutoPull.Visible = true
			AutoPull:WaitForChild("ImageLabel"):WaitForChild("StandCount").Text = "Auto Pull"
			AutoPull.Parent = Get
		end
	end
end
local function updateAlert() --[[ Line: 280 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = main
		[2] = canRebirthLocally
		[3] = Assets
	--]]
	local v_12 = main:FindFirstChild("left")
	if v_12 then
		v_12 = v_12:FindFirstChild("Rebirth")
	end
	if v_12 then
		local alert = v_12:FindFirstChild("alert")
		local flag_7 = canRebirthLocally()
		if flag_7 and not alert then
			local alert_2 = Assets:FindFirstChild("alert")
			if alert_2 then
				alert_2:Clone().Parent = v_12
				return
			end
		elseif not flag_7 and alert then
			alert:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

		local function fmt(param_29) --[[ Line: 248 ]]
			--[[
			Upvalues:
				[1] = entry
			--]]
			local value = tonumber(param_29) or 0
			if math.abs(value) < 1000 then
				return "$" .. value
			end
			local value_2 = math.abs(value)
			local v_3 = math.log10(value_2) / 3
			value_2 = math.floor(v_3)
			v_3 = #entry - 1
			local value_3 = math.min(value_2, v_3)
			v_3 = value / 10 ^ (value_3 * 3)
			return "$" .. (v_3 == math.floor(v_3) and math.floor(v_3) or string.format("%.1f", v_3)) .. entry[value_3 + 1]
		end

					--[[
					Upvalues:

								--]]

								end
							end)
						end

							["Size"] = UDim2.new(0.72, 0, 0, 0)
						}):Play()

						frame_5.Size = UDim2.new(0.72, 0, 0.82, 0)
						frame_5.BackgroundTransparency = 0.08
					else
						frame_5.Visible = true
						frame_5.BackgroundTransparency = 1
						frame_5.Size = UDim2.new(0.72, 0, 0, 0)

						end

						TweenService:Create(frame_5, TweenInfo.new(0.25, Enum.EasingStyle.Back), {
							["Size"] = UDim2.new(0.72, 0, 0.82, 0)
						}):Play()
						_toggle:refreshPlayers()
						AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({})
						AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({})
					end
				end

			local function smartTeleport(flag_44, flag_45) --[[ Line: 1840 ]]
				--[[
				Upvalues:
					[1] = self_17
					[2] = AdminPanelRemote
				--]]
				if flag_44 and flag_44 ~= "" then
					local flag_46 = tonumber(flag_44)
					task.spawn(function() --[[ Line: 1845 ]]
						--[[
						Upvalues:
							[1] = flag_46
							[2] = flag_44
							[3] = self_17
							[4] = flag_45
							[5] = AdminPanelRemote
						--]]
						if not flag_46 then
							local flag_47, v_73 = pcall(function() --[[ Line: 1847 ]]
								--[[
								Upvalues:
									[1] = flag_44
								--]]
								return game:GetService("Players"):GetUserIdFromNameAsync(flag_44)
							end)
							if not (flag_47 and v_73) then
								self_17:toast("User not found: " .. flag_44, false)
								return
							end
							flag_46 = v_73
						end
						local DisplayName = game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayerByUserId(flag_46)
						if DisplayName then
							if flag_45 then
								AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({
									["username"] = DisplayName.Name
								})
								self_17:toast("Bringing " .. DisplayName.DisplayName)
							else
								AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({
									["targetUserId"] = flag_46
								})
								self_17:toast("Teleporting to " .. DisplayName.DisplayName)
							end
						elseif flag_45 then
							self_17:toast("Player not here \226\128\148 sending cross-server bring request...", true)
							AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({
								["username"] = flag_44,
								["targetUserId"] = flag_46
							})
						else
							self_17:toast("Not in this server \226\128\148 searching all servers...", true)
							AdminPanelRemote:FireServer({
								["targetUserId"] = flag_46
							})
						end
					end)
				else
					self_17:toast("Enter a username or UserId", false)
				end
			end

local function getSellPrice(mutation) --[[ Line: 111 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = entry
		[2] = MoneyConfig
	--]]
	if entry[mutation.rarity or "Common"] then
		return nil
	end
	local weight = mutation.weight or 25
	local pricePerKg = MoneyConfig.pricePerKg or 0.05
	local value = MoneyConfig.mutationMultiplier[mutation.mutation or "Basic"] or 1
	local value_2 = MoneyConfig.rarityFloor[mutation.rarity or "Common"] or 300
	local v_2 = weight / 1000 * pricePerKg * value
	local v_3 = math.floor(v_2)
	v_2 = value_2 * value
	local v_4 = math.floor(v_2)
	return math.max(v_3, v_4)
end
local function formatPrice(value_3) --[[ Line: 121 ]]
	if value_3 >= 1000000000000 then
		return string.format("$%.2fT", value_3 / 1000000000000)
	elseif value_3 >= 1000000000 then
		return string.format("$%.2fB", value_3 / 1000000000)
	elseif value_3 >= 1000000 then
		return string.format("$%.2fM", value_3 / 1000000)
	elseif value_3 >= 1000 then
		return string.format("$%.1fK", value_3 / 1000)
	else
		return "$" .. tostring(value_3)
	end
end
local function formatWeight(value_4) --[[ Line: 129 ]]
	if value_4 >= 1000000000 then
		return string.format("%.2fBkg", value_4 / 1000000000)
	elseif value_4 >= 1000000 then
		return string.format("%.2fMkg", value_4 / 1000000)
	elseif value_4 >= 1000 then
		return string.format("%.1fkg", value_4 / 1000)
	else
		return value_4 .. "g"
	end
end

	end

local function computeScale(X) --[[ Line: 31 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = vector2
		[2] = UserInputService
	--]]
	local X_2 = X.X
	local Y = X.Y
	local value = math.min(X_2, Y)
	math.max(X_2, Y)
	local v_2 = X_2 / vector2.X
	local value_2 = Y / vector2.Y
	local value_3 = math.min(v_2, value_2)
	if not UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
		if not UserInputService.GamepadEnabled then
			return math.clamp(value_3, 0.55, 1.5)
		end
		value_2 = value_3 * 1.1
		return math.clamp(value_2, 0.75, 1.4)
	end
	value_2 = value / 550
	value = value_3 * 0.4 + value_2 * 0.6
	value_3 = 60 * (X_2 / vector2.X) * value
	if value_3 < 44 then
		value = value * (44 / value_3)
	end
	value_3 = 400 * (Y / vector2.Y) * value
	if Y * 0.55 < value_3 then
		value = value * (Y * 0.55 / value_3)
	end
	return math.clamp(value, 0.38, 0.95)
end

local function init() --[[ Line: 228 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = SettingsRemote
		[2] = ReplicatedStorage
		[3] = SettingsSaveRemote
		[4] = loadSettings
		[5] = setupUI
	--]]
	SettingsRemote = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("SettingsRemote", 10)
	SettingsSaveRemote = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("SettingsSaveRemote", 10)
	if SettingsRemote then
		pcall(loadSettings)
	end
	task.wait(3)
	for index_3 = 1, 10 do
		local setupUI_2, v_14 = pcall(setupUI)
		if setupUI_2 then
			if v_14 == true then
				print("[SettingsUIController] UI connected on attempt " .. index_3)
				break
			end
		else
			warn("[SettingsUIController] setupUI error attempt " .. index_3 .. ": " .. tostring(v_14))
		end
		task.wait(1)
	end
	print("[SettingsUIController] Ready")
end

	local function applyTheme(bloomIntensity, param) --[[ Line: 420 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:
			[1] = TweenService

			["FogEnd"] = bloomIntensity.fogEnd
		}):Play()

			TweenService:Create(Atmosphere, param, {
				["Density"] = bloomIntensity.atmoDensity,
				["Haze"] = bloomIntensity.atmoHaze,

				["Glare"] = bloomIntensity.atmoGlare,
				["Decay"] = bloomIntensity.atmoDecay
			}):Play()
		end

				["Brightness"] = bloomIntensity.ccBrightness,
				["Contrast"] = bloomIntensity.ccContrast,
				["Saturation"] = bloomIntensity.ccSaturation
			}):Play()
		end
		if BloomEffect then
			TweenService:Create(BloomEffect, param, {
				["Intensity"] = bloomIntensity.bloomIntensity,
				["Size"] = bloomIntensity.bloomSize,
				["Threshold"] = bloomIntensity.bloomThreshold
			}):Play()
		end
	end

	local function ActivateCameraController(self_4) --[[ Line: 336 ]]

		local computerCameraMovementMode = self_4:GetCameraMovementModeFromSettings()
		local v_6 = nil
		if CameraType_2 == Enum.CameraType.Scriptable then
			if self_4.activeCameraController then

				self_4.activeCameraController = nil
			end
		else

				computerCameraMovementMode = Enum.ComputerCameraMovementMode.Follow
			elseif CameraType_2 == Enum.CameraType.Orbital then
				computerCameraMovementMode = Enum.ComputerCameraMovementMode.Orbital

			end

				end
			end

				end
			end

				v_7 = entry[v_6]

			end

					end

local function SetCameraToSubjectDistance(self_21, value_8) --[[ Line: 597 ]]

		[2] = ZoomController

		end

			end

			if self_21.inFirstPerson then
				self_21:LeaveFirstPerson()
			end
		end
	end
	local v_19 = self_21.currentSubjectDistance
	local CameraMinZoomDistance_3 = value_8 - currentSubjectDistance_2
	ZoomController.SetZoomParameters(v_19, (math.sign(CameraMinZoomDistance_3)))

	if flagTable and #flagTable ~= 0 then
		local value_4 = #flagTable
		entry[1] = renderPoint(flagTable[value_4], true)
		if entry[1] then
			local amount = 0
			while true do
				local value_5 = flagTable[value_4]
				local magnitude = flagTable[value_4 - 1]
				if value_4 < 2 then
					break
				end
				local magnitude_2 = magnitude - value_5
				magnitude = magnitude_2.magnitude
				if magnitude < amount then
					amount = amount - magnitude
					value_4 = value_4 - 1
				else
					value_4 = renderPoint(value_5 + magnitude_2.unit * amount, false)
					if value_4 then
						entry[#entry + 1] = value_4
					end
					amount = amount + state_table.spacing
				end
			end
			PathDisplayPoints.Parent = workspace.CurrentCamera
		end
	else
		return
	end
end
state_table.renderPath = renderPath
return state_table

		[2] = flag

		[4] = MovementUpdate

				end

						end

local function getIndex(self_17, X_5) --[[ Line: 553 ]]
	local Direction = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(X_5.X, X_5.Y)
	local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
	raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
	local InstanceTable = {}
	for index_3, model_6 in self_17.activeBrainrots do
		if not (model_6.model and model_6.model.Parent) then
			continue
		end
		local model_7 = model_6.model
		table.insert(InstanceTable, model_7)
	end
	raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = InstanceTable
	InstanceTable = workspace:Raycast(Direction.Origin, Direction.Direction * 500, raycastParams)
	if InstanceTable and InstanceTable.Instance then
		for index_4, model_8 in self_17.activeBrainrots do
			if not model_8.model or not InstanceTable.Instance:IsDescendantOf(model_8.model) and model_8.model ~= InstanceTable.Instance then
				continue
			end
			return index_4, model_8
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function isClickOnRiver(self_18, X_6) --[[ Line: 574 ]]

	raycastParams_2.FilterDescendantsInstances = { _waterVisualPart }

local function startCastCheckLoop(self_29) --[[ Line: 857 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = RunService
		[2] = localPlayer
		[3] = Knit
		[4] = Brainrots

	self_29.trove:Connect(RunService.Heartbeat, function() --[[ Line: 859 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:

			[2] = localPlayer
			[3] = Knit
			[4] = Brainrots
		--]]
		local TutorialController = self_29.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId]
		if not TutorialController then
			return
		end

			return
		end

		local radius = TutorialController.radius
		TutorialController = Knit.GetController("TutorialController")

			model_11 = TutorialController:getStep() == 2
		end

			if brainrotName.dropping then
				continue
			end

				model_11 = Brainrots[brainrotName.brainrotName]
				if not model_11 or model_11.rarity == "Common" then
					local model_12 = brainrotName.model
					if model_12 and model_12.Parent then
						local value_46 = self_29:getModelPosition(model_12)
						if value_46 and (value_46 - position_9).Magnitude <= radius then
							self_29.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId] = nil
							self_29.localHookUUID = index_5
							self_29.localCastActive = false
							self_29:setRiverHoverActive(false)
							self_29:applyHookEffects(index_5)
							self_29:playHookAnimation(localPlayer.UserId, index_5)
							self_29._sfx:play("hookFall")
							self_29._sfx:play("brainrotHookStarted")
							self_29:onCatchStart(index_5, brainrotName)
							self_29.FishingService.remote:Fire({
								["uuid"] = index_5
							})
							return
						end
					end
				end
			else
				model_11 = brainrotName.model
				if model_11 and model_11.Parent then
					local value_46 = self_29:getModelPosition(model_12)
					if value_46 and (value_46 - position_9).Magnitude <= radius then
						self_29.activeCastPositions[localPlayer.UserId] = nil

		local value_76 = (CRITICAL.SERVER_COOLDOWN or 2) - value_75
		local v_53 = math.max(0, value_76) + 0.5

			continue

			end

					local index_17 = index_16

				end

		end
	end

local function switchTab(self_2, param_9) --[[ Line: 228 ]]
	--[[
	Upvalues:
		[1] = state_table
	--]]
	self_2.currentTab = param_9
	for index_2, entry_2 in self_2.tabButtons do
		entry_2.BackgroundColor3 = index_2 == param_9 and state_table.active or state_table.inactive
	end
	for index_3, Name in self_2.content:GetChildren() do
		if not Name:IsA("Frame") or Name.Name == "ResultLabel" then
			continue
		end
		Name.Visible = Name.Name == param_9 .. "Tab"
	end
end
config.switchTab = switchTab

			--[[
			Upvalues:
				[1] = Parent
			--]]
			local aTable = {}
			local aState = {
				["b"] = {
					["c"] = {}
				}
			}
			aTable.a = aState
			aState = Parent.Copy(aTable, true)
			expect(aTable).never.to.equal(aState)
			expect(aTable.a).never.to.equal(aState.a)
			expect(aState.a.b.c.d).to.equal(aTable.a.b.c.d)
		end)
	end)

		--[[
		Upvalues:

		--]]
		it("should reconcile table", function() --[[ Line: 91 ]]
			--[[
			Upvalues:
				[1] = Parent
			--]]
			local config = {
				["stuff"] = {},
				["stuff3"] = { "data" }
			}
			local configTable = {
				["stuff"] = { "abc", "xyz" },
				["stuff2"] = {}
			}
			local deaths = Parent.Reconcile(configTable, config)
			expect(deaths).never.to.equal(configTable)
			expect(deaths).never.to.equal(config)
			expect(deaths.kills).to.equal(10)
			expect(deaths.deaths).to.equal(4)
			expect(deaths.xp).to.equal(10)
			expect(deaths.stuff[1]).to.equal("abc")
			expect(deaths.stuff[2]).to.equal("xyz")
			expect(deaths.extra).to.equal(5)
			local v_2 = deaths.stuff2
			expect((type(v_2))).to.equal("table")
			expect(deaths.stuff2).never.to.equal(configTable.stuff2)
			expect(deaths.stuff2.abc).to.equal(10)
			v_2 = deaths.stuff3
			expect((type(v_2))).to.equal("boolean")
			expect(deaths.stuff3).to.equal(true)
		end)
	end)

	describe("Zip", function() --[[ Line: 585 ]]
		--[[
		Upvalues:

		--]]
		it("should zip arrays together", function() --[[ Line: 587 ]]
			--[[
			Upvalues:
				[1] = Parent
			--]]
			local entry_6 = {
				1,
				2,
				3,
				4,
				5
			}
			local entry_7 = {
				9,
				8,
				7,
				6,
				5
			}
			local entry_8 = {
				1,
				1,
				1,
				1,
				1
			}
			for index_2, entry_9 in Parent.Zip(entry_6, entry_7, entry_8) do
				expect(entry_9[1]).to.equal(entry_6[index_2])
				expect(entry_9[2]).to.equal(entry_7[index_2])
				expect(entry_9[3]).to.equal(entry_8[index_2])
				local index_3 = index_2
			end
			local equal = expect(0).to.equal
			local index_3 = #entry_6
			entry_6 = #entry_7
			entry_7 = #entry_8
			equal((math.min(index_3, entry_6, entry_7)))
		end)

				expect(entry_13[2]).to.equal(entry_11[index_4])
				expect(entry_13[3]).to.equal(entry_12[index_4])

			end
			local equal_2 = expect(0).to.equal
			local index_5 = #entry_10
			entry_10 = #entry_11
			entry_11 = #entry_12
			equal_2((math.min(index_5, entry_10, entry_11)))
		end)

local function getRiverInfo() --[[ Line: 93 ]]
	local riverPart = workspace:WaitForChild("riverPart")
	local cframe = riverPart.CFrame
	local size = riverPart.Size
	return {
		["riverPart"] = riverPart,
		["riverCF"] = cframe,
		["riverSize"] = size,
		["flowDirection"] = cframe.LookVector,
		["riverSurfaceY"] = cframe.Position.Y + size.Y / 2,
		["riverLength"] = size.Z,
		["riverWidth"] = size.X
	}
end

return config

-- [[ ReplicatedStorage.CmdrClient.Commands.thru ]]
-- Decompiled with x2125.xyz
return {
	["Aliases"] = { "t", "through" },
	["Args"] = {
		{}
	},
	["ClientRun"] = function(Executor, value) --[[ Line: 15 ]]
		local Hit = Executor.Executor:GetMouse()
		local character = Executor.Executor.Character
		if not (character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
			return "You don\'t have a character."
		end
		local position = character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
		local unit = Hit.Hit.p - position
		character:MoveTo(unit * 2 + unit.unit * value + position)
		return "Blinked!"
	end
}
